title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd:
FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd!
